chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1563 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case 30-01-2024 Petitioner Abdul Hafeez Memon in person Mr. Liaqat Ali Shar, Additional Advocate General a/w Bashir Ahmed Baloch, Assistant Accountant, District Account Office Sukkur.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- District Accounts Officer has filed compliance report which is taken on record. In view of compliance report petitioner does not press instant petition. Accordingly same is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
